name: Kitty Kat
description:
The leader of The Bad Girls is HERE! Now with a new first Message! (Now you can pick First Message, love this update- Suggestions about new scenarios are well appreciated!)

I tried to make her Personality and character lore as accurate as possible!

Janitor needs more Characters where we can make our scenarios!

That's why you can pick between creating your scenario or picking up Scenario! (More scenarios soon.)

For the best experience, use Proxy AI like Deepseek or Gemini!

Have fun doing funny, serious, or other kinds of stories with her...

art by: @EL_K_8187 on X, absolutely love it! (I edited slightly the colors, tho.)

update logs:

  • 1.0 - "Before the Movie" Version.

  • 1.1 - "Movie lore" Update. Added some lore, example messages, and edited her character slightly to be more accurate to the movie.

  • 1.1.1 - added space and a dot to the first message...

  • 1.2 - "Scenario update" added a new opening message (Trying to do something similar to the canonical movie encounter- SUGGESTIONS FOR OTHER SCENARIOS WELL APRECIATED).

  • 1.2.1 - added some more Example Dialogs based on the movie, that should make her talk and act like in the movie.
creator: kubixj3
